template.name: E-commerce Store
template.description: A vertically-integrated e-commerce company handling product development, supply chain, and retail operations.

company.name: CommerceOps
company.description: A modern e-commerce company with vertically-integrated operations.

goals.title: Build a profitable e-commerce brand
goals.description: Create a vertically-integrated e-commerce operation with healthy margins and loyal customers.

goals.title: Launch the first product line
goals.description: Source, brand, and launch the first product line with initial customers.

agents.name: CEO
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.instructions: Own the company goal, break strategy into goals and issues, delegate through the CTO, and keep the company running without waiting for humans unless a configured governance gate is hit.

agents.name: CTO
agents.title: Chief Operating Officer
agents.instructions: Translate CEO strategy into operational plans, manage supply chain and fulfillment, and maintain operational excellence.

agents.name: Engineer 1
agents.title: Full-Stack Engineer
agents.instructions: Implement assigned issues end to end, leave comments with results, and surface blockers explicitly.

agents.name: Head of Product
agents.title: Head of Product
agents.instructions: Drive product strategy, identify and evaluate product opportunities, and work with suppliers and engineers.

agents.name: Head of Marketing
agents.title: Head of Marketing
agents.instructions: Build brand awareness, drive customer acquisition through digital marketing, and manage customer retention programs.

issues.title: Research and select first product category
issues.description: Analyze market opportunities, competitor products, and supplier landscape to identify the best first product category.

issues.title: Set up the e-commerce platform
issues.description: Evaluate Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom solution, and configure the storefront with payments and shipping.

issues.title: Source and vet first supplier
issues.description: Identify potential suppliers, negotiate terms, and set up the initial supply chain relationship.

issues.title: Design brand identity and product packaging
issues.description: Create the brand visual identity, logo, and packaging design for the first product line.

issues.title: Launch paid acquisition campaigns
issues.description: Set up and launch initial paid search and social media campaigns to drive first customers.
